languages.text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
Caster suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of the battle.

traits.locale_text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
Caster suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of the battle.

languages.text:
Цель должна пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g}, иначе получает эффект {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}седация{/g} на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Если цель получает урон до начала своего следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g}, {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}седация{/g} снимается и цель получает эффект {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}раннее пробуждение{/g}.
Если {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}седация{/g} не снята до конца раунда, цель не получает {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}раннее пробуждение{/g}.
Обладатель аугмента получает +1 уровень {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}утомления{/g} до конца боя.

If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g}.
The user suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

The user suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

The target must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
At the start of each turn, the user loses −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} until the end of combat.

The target must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
At the start of each turn, the user loses −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} until the end of combat.

languages.text:
La cible doit réussir un test de résistance d'Endurance. En cas d'échec, elle subit {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sédation{/g} durant 1 round. Si elle subit des dégâts avant le début de son prochain tour, l'effet est supprimé.
Le cas échéant, elle bénéficie à la place de {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Réveil anticipé{/g}. Si l'effet Sédation n'est pas dissipé avant la fin du round, elle n'obtient pas {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Réveil anticipé{/g}.
L'utilisateur souffre de {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}Fatigue{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g}.
The user suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

Le cas échéant, elle bénéficie à la place de {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Réveil anticipé{/g}. Si l'effet Sédation n'est pas dissipé avant la fin du round, elle n'obtient pas {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Réveil anticipé{/g}.

languages.text:
Hedef, Dayanıklılık direnç testinden geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedasyon{/g} etkisine maruz kalır. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer. Hedef, bir sonraki turu başlamadan önce hasar alırsa sedasyon ortadan kalkar.
Sedasyon bu şekilde ortadan kalkarsa hedef, {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}erken uyanan{/g} etkisi kazanır. Sedasyon, raunt bitiminden önce kaldırılmazsa hedef, {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}erken uyanan{/g} etkisi kazanamaz.
Kullanıcı, {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}yorgunluğa{/g} maruz kalır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
languages.original_text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g}.
The user suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Hedef, Dayanıklılık direnç testinden geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedasyon{/g} etkisine maruz kalır. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer. Hedef, bir sonraki turu başlamadan önce hasar alırsa sedasyon ortadan kalkar.
Sedasyon bu şekilde ortadan kalkarsa hedef, {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}erken uyanan{/g} etkisi kazanır. Sedasyon, raunt bitiminden önce kaldırılmazsa hedef, {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}erken uyanan{/g} etkisi kazanamaz.
Kullanıcı, {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}yorgunluğa{/g} maruz kalır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

languages.text:
目标必须通过一项坚韧抗性检定，否则陷入{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}镇静{/g}状态，持续1轮。若目标在其下个回合开始前受到伤害，解除镇静状态。
若以此方式解除镇静状态，目标获得{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早醒{/g}效果。若镇静状态在本轮结束前仍未解除，则目标不会获得{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早醒{/g}效果。
使用者陷入{g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}疲劳{/g}状态，直到战斗结束。
languages.original_text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g}.
The user suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
目标必须通过一项坚韧抗性检定，否则陷入{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}镇静{/g}状态，持续1轮。若目标在其下个回合开始前受到伤害，解除镇静状态。
若以此方式解除镇静状态，目标获得{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早醒{/g}效果。若镇静状态在本轮结束前仍未解除，则目标不会获得{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早醒{/g}效果。
使用者陷入{g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}疲劳{/g}状态，直到战斗结束。

languages.text:
El objetivo debe superar una prueba de fortaleza de Resistencia o sufrirá el efecto {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedación{/g} durante 1 asalto. Si el objetivo sufre algún daño antes de que empiece su próximo turno, se elimina el efecto de sedación.
Si se elimina de este modo el efecto de sedación, el objetivo gana el efecto {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}despertar prematuro{/g}. Si no se elimina el efecto de sedación antes del final del asalto, el objetivo no gana {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}despertar prematuro{/g}.
El usuario sufre {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigado{/g} hasta el final del combate.
languages.original_text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g}.
The user suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
El objetivo debe superar una prueba de fortaleza de Resistencia o sufrirá el efecto {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedación{/g} durante 1 asalto. Si el objetivo sufre algún daño antes de que empiece su próximo turno, se elimina el efecto de sedación.
Si se elimina de este modo el efecto de sedación, el objetivo gana el efecto {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}despertar prematuro{/g}. Si no se elimina el efecto de sedación antes del final del asalto, el objetivo no gana {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}despertar prematuro{/g}.
El usuario sufre {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigado{/g} hasta el final del combate.

languages.text:
Das Ziel muss eine Widerstandsprobe auf Zähigkeit bestehen, um nicht 1 Runde lang mit {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedierung{/g} belegt zu werden. Erleidet das Ziel vor dem Beginn seines nächsten Zuges Schaden, wird "Sedierung" entfernt.
Wird "Sedierung" auf diese Weise entfernt, erhält das Ziel den Effekt {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Frühe Erweckung{/g}. Wird "Sedierung" nicht vor dem Ende der Runde entfernt, erhält das Ziel {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Frühe Erweckung{/g} nicht.
Der Nutzer wird bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}Erschöpft{/g} belegt.
languages.original_text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g}.
The user suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

Das Ziel muss eine Widerstandsprobe auf Zähigkeit bestehen, um nicht 1 Runde lang mit {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedierung{/g} belegt zu werden. Erleidet das Ziel vor dem Beginn seines nächsten Zuges Schaden, wird "Sedierung" entfernt.
Wird "Sedierung" auf diese Weise entfernt, erhält das Ziel den Effekt {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Frühe Erweckung{/g}. Wird "Sedierung" nicht vor dem Ende der Runde entfernt, erhält das Ziel {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Frühe Erweckung{/g} nicht.
Der Nutzer wird bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}Erschöpft{/g} belegt.

languages.text:
対象は耐久力抵抗判定に成功しなければ、1ラウンドの間{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}効果を受ける。対象が次のターン開始前にダメージを受けた場合、{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}は解除される。
この方法で{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}が解除された場合、対象は{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早期覚醒{/g}効果を得る。ラウンド終了前に{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}が解除されなかった場合、対象は{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早期覚醒{/g}を得ない。
使用者は戦闘終了まで{g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}疲労{/g}状態を受ける。
languages.original_text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed.
If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
対象は耐久力抵抗判定に成功しなければ、1ラウンドの間{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}効果を受ける。対象が次のターン開始前にダメージを受けた場合、{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}は解除される。
この方法で{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}が解除された場合、対象は{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早期覚醒{/g}効果を得る。ラウンド終了前に{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}が解除されなかった場合、対象は{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早期覚醒{/g}を得ない。
使用者は戦闘終了まで{g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}疲労{/g}状態を受ける。
